title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containerd/containerd to v1.7.18
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com) This PR contains the following updates: | Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence | |---|---|---|---|---|---| | [github.com/containerd/containerd](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd) | `v1.7.17` -> `v1.7.18` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fcontainerd/v1.7.18?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fcontainerd/v1.7.18?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fcontainerd/v1.7.17/v1.7.18?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainerd%2fcontainerd/v1.7.17/v1.7.18?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | --- ### Release Notes
containerd/containerd (github.com/containerd/containerd) ### [`v1.7.18`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/releases/tag/v1.7.18): containerd 1.7.18 [Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/compare/v1.7.17...v1.7.18) Welcome to the v1.7.18 release of containerd! The eighteenth patch release for containerd 1.7 contains various updates along with an updated version of Go. Go 1.22.4 and 1.21.11 include a fix for a symlink time of check to time of use race condition during directory removal. ##### Highlights - Update Go version to 1.21.11 ([#​10298](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10298)) - Remove uses of `platforms.Platform` alias ([#​10277](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10277)) - Migrate log imports to `github.com/containerd/log` ([#​10269](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10269)) - Migrate errdefs package to `github.com/containerd/errdefs` ([#​10266](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10266)) - Fix usage of "unknown" platform ([#​10261](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10261)) Please try out the release binaries and report any issues at https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues. ##### Contributors - Derek McGowan - Sebastiaan van Stijn - Akhil Mohan - Austin Vazquez - Phil Estes ##### Changes
16 commits

- Prepare release notes for v1.7.18 ([#​10301](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10301)) - [`9426aab62`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/9426aab62b6496ad93edb7e08b8655bb92d3a84b) Prepare release notes for v1.7.18 - Update Go version to 1.21.11 ([#​10298](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10298)) - [`cdd3ea913`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/cdd3ea913586c6e3d1098416a5cded136d761456) Update Go version to 1.21.11 - Remove uses of `platforms.Platform` alias ([#​10277](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10277)) - [`1e3c662d6`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/1e3c662d6c2bd0eafdcd402a32324e84d5f0498b) \[release/1.7] remove uses of platforms.Platform alias - Migrate log imports to `github.com/containerd/log` ([#​10269](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10269)) - [`0af6825b1`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/0af6825b1e64d56ffd72f801c4fb1224f888c367) migrate logs imports to github.com/containerd/log module - Migrate errdefs package to `github.com/containerd/errdefs` ([#​10266](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10266)) - [`308341a44`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/308341a4464bd723630d3df19a5df20aa252af9f) replace uses of github.com/containerd/containerd/errdefs - [`47ff8cfce`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/47ff8cfce0768d4f4c98ad05bd72e8f9ad8dfb5c) migrate errdefs package to github.com/containerd/errdefs module - Fix usage of "unknown" platform ([#​10261](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10261)) - [`f4d11912a`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/f4d11912a77c1e15db200aed7481d45bd12b5eb1) core/image: fix usage of "unknown" platform - Explicitly set release latest to true ([#​10265](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/pull/10265)) - [`5b0480009`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/5b0480009c5f4ee1f8a80cbe7aae22642867ee25) Explicitly set release latest to true - [`d669b100d`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/d669b100d5337150d7f9a170de55ac7d2d7ec24c) build(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 1 to 2

##### Changes from containerd/errdefs
6 commits

- Add common files ([containerd/errdefs#1](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/pull/1)) - [`78f3494`](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/commit/78f3494a77384f066cd3457e1dfa1bda180f180d) Add Github actions configuration - [`46f1770`](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/commit/46f1770bd5e80699a13fa107e0d5b195d1db9db4) Add go.mod configuration - [`959121a`](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/commit/959121a299905905fed65b533f72a7ee36786301) Add README.md - Add LICENSE ([containerd/errdefs#2](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/pull/2)) - [`33a2275`](https://togithub.com/containerd/errdefs/commit/33a2275efb9a92237b9a8e7f41c31672f3293ccb) Add LICENSE

##### Dependency Changes - **github.com/containerd/errdefs** v0.1.0 ***new*** - **google.golang.org/genproto** [`b8732ec`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/b8732ec3820d) -> [`e6e6cda`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/e6e6cdab5c13) - **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/api** [`b8732ec`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/b8732ec3820d) -> [`007df8e`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/007df8e322eb) - **google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc** [`b8732ec`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/b8732ec3820d) -> [`d307bd8`](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/commit/d307bd883b97) Previous release can be found at [v1.7.17](https://togithub.com/containerd/containerd/releases/tag/v1.7.17)
